Benefits of Membership

MENU

Internship in various surgical fields which include but is not limited to

- Suturing surgical wounds

- Preparing patients for surgery

Research in surgical fields

Take courses on basic medical sciences that are especially important for surgery

Attending conferences and workshops on surgery

Special discounts on websites for medical education (Osmosis, Lecturio, Kenhub, etc)

You can improve your C.V by adding all the activities that you perform in O’SIG
